NKJV.1: A Song of Ascents. Blessed is every one who fears the LORD, Who walks in His ways.
NKJV.2: When you eat the labor of your hands, You shall be happy, and it shall be well with you.
NKJV.3: Your wife shall be like a fruitful vine In the very heart of your house, Your children like olive plants All around your table.
NKJV.4: Behold, thus shall the man be blessed Who fears the LORD.
NKJV.5: The LORD bless you out of Zion, And may you see the good of Jerusalem All the days of your life.
NKJV.6: Yes, may you see your children’s children. Peace be upon Israel!

ESV.1: Blessed is everyone who fears the LORD, who walks in his ways!
ESV.2: You shall eat the fruit of the labor of your hands; you shall be blessed, and it shall be well with you.
ESV.3: Your wife will be like a fruitful vine within your house; your children will be like olive shoots around your table.
ESV.4: Behold, thus shall the man be blessed who fears the LORD.
ESV.5: The LORD bless you from Zion! May you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life!
ESV.6: May you see your children's children! Peace be upon Israel!

NASB.1: A Song of Ascents. How blessed is everyone who fears the LORD, Who walks in His ways.
NASB.2: When you shall eat of the fruit of your hands, You will be happy and it will be well with you.
NASB.3: Your wife shall be like a fruitful vine Within your house, Your children like olive plants Around your table.
NASB.4: Behold, for thus shall the man be blessed Who fears the LORD.
NASB.5: The LORD bless you from Zion, And may you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life.
NASB.6: Indeed, may you see your children's children. Peace be upon Israel!

NLT.1:
How joyful are those who fear the LORD —
all who follow his ways!
NLT.2:
You will enjoy the fruit of your labor.
How joyful and prosperous you will be!
NLT.3:
Your wife will be like a fruitful grapevine,
flourishing within your home.
Your children will be like vigorous young olive trees
as they sit around your table.
NLT.4:
That is the LORD’s blessing
for those who fear him.
NLT.5:
May the LORD continually bless you from Zion.
May you see Jerusalem prosper as long as you live.
NLT.6:
May you live to enjoy your grandchildren.
May Israel have peace!

WEB.1: A Song of Ascents. Blessed is everyone who fears Yahweh, who walks in his ways.
WEB.2: For you will eat the labor of your hands. You will be happy, and it will be well with you.
WEB.3: Your wife will be as a fruitful vine, in the innermost parts of your house; your children like olive plants, around your table.
WEB.4: Behold, thus is the man blessed who fears Yahweh.
WEB.5: May Yahweh bless you out of Zion, and may you see the good of Jerusalem all the days of your life.
WEB.6: Yes, may you see your children’s children. Peace be upon Israel.

CSB17.1:
A song of ascents. [1] How happy is everyone who fears the LORD,
who walks in his ways! ⓛ
CSB17.2:
You will surely eat
what your hands have worked for. ⓜ
You will be happy,
and it will go well for you. ⓝ
CSB17.3:
Your wife will be like a fruitful vine
within your house,
your children, like young olive trees
around your table. ⓐ
CSB17.4:
In this very way
the man who fears the LORD
will be blessed. ⓑ
CSB17.5:
May the LORD bless you from Zion,
so that you will see the prosperity of Jerusalem
all the days of your life ⓒ
CSB17.6:
and will see your children’s children!
Peace be with Israel. ⓓ

AMP.1:
A Song of Ascents. Blessed [happy and sheltered by God's favor] is everyone who fears the LORD [and worships Him with obedience],
Who walks in His ways and lives according to His commandments.
AMP.2:
For you shall eat the fruit of [the labor of] your hands,
You will be happy and blessed and it will be well with you.
AMP.3:
Your wife shall be like a fruitful vine
Within the innermost part of your house;
Your children will be like olive plants
Around your table.
AMP.4:
Behold, for so shall the man be blessed and divinely favored
Who fears the LORD [and worships Him with obedience].
AMP.5:
May the LORD bless you from Zion [His holy mountain],
And may you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life;
AMP.6:
Indeed, may you see your [family perpetuated in your] children's children.
Peace be upon Israel!

MSG.1:
A pilgrim song
All you who fear God,how blessed you are!
how happily you walk on his smooth straight road!
MSG.2:
You worked hard and deserve all you've got coming.
Enjoy the blessing! Revel in the goodness!
MSG.3:
Your wife will bear children as a vine bears grapes,
your household lush as a vineyard,
The children around your table
as fresh and promising as young olive shoots.
MSG.4:
Stand in awe of God's Yes.
Oh, how he blesses the one who fears God!
MSG.5:
Enjoy the good life in Jerusalem
every day of your life.
MSG.6:
And enjoy your grandchildren.
Peace to Israel!

NIV.1:
Psalm 128
A song of ascents.
Blessed are all who fear the Lord,
who walk in his ways.
NIV.2:
You will eat the fruit of your labor;
blessings and prosperity will be yours.
NIV.3:
Your wife will be like a fruitful vine
within your house;
your sons will be like olive shoots
around your table.
NIV.4:
Thus is the man blessed
who fears the Lord.
NIV.5:
May the Lord bless you from Zion
all the days of your life;
may you see the prosperity of Jerusalem,
NIV.6:
and may you live to see your children’s children.
Peace be upon Israel.

NRSVCE.1:
Happy is everyone who fears the LORD,
who walks in his ways.
NRSVCE.2:
You shall eat the fruit of the labor of your hands;
you shall be happy, and it shall go well with you.
NRSVCE.3:
Your wife will be like a fruitful vine
within your house;
your children will be like olive shoots
around your table.
NRSVCE.4:
Thus shall the man be blessed
who fears the LORD.
NRSVCE.5:
The LORD bless you from Zion.
May you see the prosperity of Jerusalem
all the days of your life.
NRSVCE.6:
May you see your children’s children.
Peace be upon Israel!

NET.1: How blessed is every one of the LORD’s loyal followers, each one who keeps his commands!
NET.2: You will eat what you worked so hard to grow. You will be blessed and secure.
NET.3: Your wife will be like a fruitful vine in the inner rooms of your house; your children will be like olive branches, as they sit all around your table.
NET.4: Yes indeed, the man who fears the LORD will be blessed in this way.
NET.5: May the LORD bless you from Zion, that you might see Jerusalem prosper all the days of your life,
NET.6: and that you might see your grandchildren. May Israel experience peace!
